target: 13. Again with Mio…!?
Shin-chan's curry... it's been a while... Thanks for the food.
Thanks for the food.
Mmm, it's delicious...
Ah, it hasn't changed a bit. This is a taste only Shinpei can bring out.
(...Those who see their Shadow will die)
(Could Ushio have been killed by a Shadow!?)
(And Mio back then too...)
…Shinpei?
! Wh-What?

Are you okay?
You're all pale…
Yeah, I just feel a little...
S-Should you take some medicine or something?
It's probably just stress. Go to sleep right after you finish eating.
You can go take a bath first, okay?
I'm fine. I think my head is just a mess from everything that's happened.
Is that so…?
Sorry to interrupt the meal. I'm going to get some fresh air for a bit...
Ah, okay. I'll leave the curry as it is.

Yeah.
I'll eat it later.
(Mio's bicycle brakes...)
(Those marks that looked like the wire was cut... What if that was someone's doing?)
(To kill Mio…)
(This is bad... I don't know what's what anymore... I can't look at the big picture with all this!! I feel like I'm going to throw up...)
(A bicycle? Did someone come?)
Huh?
(…That voice…)
What's wrong, Mio-chan! Staring blankly at your own house like that...
(That's... Totsumura-san and... Mio!?)
(What is she doing outside...? And wearing her uniform, too...)
Aha. Did you get into a fight with someone--
Ah... it hurts... ...
(...N... no... No, no, no, no, no!!!!)
(That's not Mio!!!!)
(It's a Shadow...!!)
(Th-This light is...!?)
(Wh... what is that... Mio's Shadow is getting up...!!)
(No, the Shadow multiplied into two and one of them got up...?)
(It looks exactly like Totsumura-san...! What is going on...!?)
Hurry up and finish it.
("Finish it"... finish what, exactly...?)
I know, I know. You're so impatient, Mio-chan.
It'll cause a commotion if someone sees us.
All righty then.
(Damn it, I can't see well... Did the Shadow Totsumura touch Totsumura-san's dead body?)
(Totsumura-san's dead body... disappeared...! Just from the Shadow Totsumura touching it with his hand...)
(Only a <color=#GF_TIPS_091>stain</color> was left behind where Totsumura-san vanished...!)
You are now the police officer Tetsu Totsumura.
Hm... Ah, <color=#GF_TIPS_075>I'm Tetsu Totsumura</color>... 34 years old...
No girlfriend, no prospects for promotion--
Hey, shut up!!
(He perfectly copied Totsumura-san... even his inner thoughts...!!)
(So this is how the Shadows were replacing people...!)
Mio-chan, you're so cute today too~~~~!
Give me the gun.
Huh? Could it be you haven't switched places yet?
...I failed this morning. It would have been easier to do if she was sent to the hospital...
I hate doing things the slow way~. Let's just barge in right now! We've got a gun too~~~~, see?
Firing a gun on such a quiet night would echo really loudly... This isn't America, you know!!
True that.
...I guess I'll just be scouting today...
(I... impossible... This is... reality!?--)
(!! My phone! ...From Sou...!!)
(I-I see! This time... it's the exact same time I talked to Sou about the Yoshikawa lines last loop--!)
Oh, Shin-chan.
Crap--
G...uh.
So this is where you were, Shin-chan.
Eavesdropping is a no-no, Shinpei-ku~n. That's the death penalty!
...You wanna copy him too?
No... this one is already...
(...This blood... is it mine...?)
(It's so red... I'm gonna die... from this...)
(Ah... I can finally look at the big picture...)

(…What?
…What is this…)
Shinpei…
!! Wh... Who's there!!?
Be... care... ful...
Ushio!? What...!? I can't hear you well...!!
Take good care of Mio...
KEY TIPS[<color=#GF_KEY_LOOPEND_02>2nd END</color>] acquired.
